question: Could I order a McFlurry without the Oreo pieces?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Could I order a McFlurry without the Oreo pieces?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have a McFlurry without Oreo pieces on the menu. How about the Choco Crunch flavor instead?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Okay, I'll go with Choco Crunch instead.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it, a McFlurry Choco Crunch. Anything else for you today?

history.speaker: judge
